name: Home-Made Fudgy Chocolate Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate in a double boiler.
2. In a large bowl, beat the chocolate, milk, egg yolks, and vanilla.
3. Stir in the half-and-half, whipping cream, and nuts if desired.
4. Pour into an ice cream freezer container and prepare as normal.
5. Store leftovers in the freezer. Makes about 1.5 quarts.
